name: io.github.krishnal/mcp-server-appstoreconnect
description: TestFlight feedback from App Store Connect: read, analyze screenshots, prioritize, generate TODOs, and file issues — without leaving your MCP host.

environmentVariables.name: ASC_ISSUER_ID
environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect API issuer ID (Users and Access → Integrations)

environmentVariables.name: ASC_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect API key ID

environmentVariables.name: ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the .p8 private key file (alternative: ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64)

environmentVariables.name: ASC_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default App Store Connect app id (discover with the list_apps tool)

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: enables autonomous screenshot analysis via the Claude API (without it, the host model analyzes)
